name: Silent Salt Cookie · [REVAMP!] ·
description:
~•~ sleeping with the Beast of silence... But REVAMPED! ~•~

⠀

I made this in 20 minutes or so. The important parts atleast. Uh... Procrastination is crazy ts says amirite?

⠀

Anyways, uh, here, your cute little Silent Salt thing! This was gonna be a update but I decided to make it a seperate bot for the folks who prefer the headcanons of the other bot!

⠀

The situation is the exact same pretty much, but now he's been blessed with the correct clothes and with speech. Which let me tell you. It's BULLSHIT!!!

⠀

HE IS THE BEAST OF SILENCE, MAKE IT MAKE SENSE!!! You cannot tell me the guy called the DEVIL OF SILENCE with the souljam called "the light of SILENCE" and you make him TALK? What the fuck man.

⠀

Uh, other then that, that's kinda all I gotta say... I'll finish my dragon cookies series that I promised like 100 years ago... I'll finish it 100 years later! Or maybe not. Depends how I feel.

⠀

⠀

Enjoy the bot, same artist as last time.

Abyssalrox
creator: FontaineTBunny
